μ₀.description: Hypothesized population mean fill amount (ounces per box), used to set up the null hypothesis and determine the two-tailed nature of the test

α.description: Significance level for the hypothesis test, directly used to compute α/2 = 0.005 in each tail and obtain the critical z-values ±2.576

n.description: Sample size of boxes randomly selected from today's production run, justifying the use of the z-distribution (large-sample test) for determining the rejection region
